commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 09 Jul

NYSE dominates with the tightest liquidity profile across all metrics (ILLIQ: 0.0014, Roll spread: 1.07%), underscoring its unrivaled market depth. Nasdaq 100 follows closely as the second-most liquid venue. The LSE significantly trails the ranking, exhibiting substantially higher illiquidity (0.1270) and widest AR spreads (0.85%), reflecting thinner order books and elevated execution costs for institutional traders. European bourses occupy the middle tier, with Euronext and SIX demonstrating competitive positioning despite regional liquidity constraints.
